meaning: vt.制服,践踏,奔越过,蹂躏,不顾,不考虑(某人的意见,决定,愿望等)n.代理佣金
examples: They need 12 votes to override his veto.
The president vetoed the bill, and the Senate failed by a single vote to override his veto.
A special code is needed to override the time lock.
"The desire to make mom happy seems to override any type of economic concern, " says Rist.
"Vertical jamming" sends powerful noise signals directly to the satellite to override a channel's entire feed.
